entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);

params.dst: The path builder to receive the extracted segment.
params.stop: The ending distance along the path.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to prepend a move-to at the start of the segment; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.start: The starting distance along the path, in the same units as the path's coordinates.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the measured path between two distances and appends it to a path builder.
